content.en:
Time passed, and one by one the Northern Desolation Beast Cores were consumed, improving Ye Tian's primordial-level control body.

Maybe a single Northern Desolate Beast Beast Core is not very useful, but this time Ye Tian obtained too many Northern Desolate Beast Cores, so after refining so many Northern Desolate Beast Cores, Ye Tian's primordial-level control body became more and more powerful.

Finally, after spending hundreds of thousands of years refining all the Northern Desolation Beast Beast Cores, Ye Tian's strength finally broke the shackles.

Rumble!!!

The aura of the Nine Realms level controller permeated from Ye Tian's body.

At this moment, Ye Tian had completed the final accumulation, broken the shackles, and became a Nine Realms-level controller.

"Finally reached the Nine Realms level master!"

Ye Tian was very happy.

The Nine Realms-level Controllers are already a level very close to the Ten Realms-level Controllers' circle, and they are at the same level as the Fourth Senior Sister Snow Girl Controller.

Of course, Ye Tian definitely can't beat the Snow Maiden controller now, but at least it's very close.

"The next step is to thoroughly perfect my Endless Dao, and then master the changes of hundreds of millions of Endless Dao, and integrate the Endless Dao into the origin of the Origin Realm Sea, so as to absorb the origin cultivation of the Origin Realm Sea. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

"It's time to go and see the place where the Primal Ancestor stayed, maybe you can get some benefits. "

Ye Tian got up, left this temporary cave mansion, and came to the Taichu Pavilion in Taichu Mountain.

The Primal Pavilion has a lot of secret art books, and any Eternal Master can come here to browse them, but if each Eternal Master browses the same book, they must leave a book of secret arts in exchange.

Of course, the books that remain do not need to be too good, but they must be kept.

As a result, today's Taichu Pavilion has stored countless mystical classics.

Ye Tian was going to stay in the Taichu Pavilion for a period of time before going to other places.

Taichu Pavilion.

Ye Tian came in, and the machine spirit here appeared.

"When you enter the Taichu Pavilion, you can browse any classics, but you must leave the classics, if the classics left behind are qualified to observe the corresponding secret art classics, I will open the permission. "

The Primal Pavilion Instrument Spirit reminded.

Almost every Eternal Master who enters here, he will remind him once.

Of course, if he came in the second time, he wouldn't have been reminded.

"Thanks for the reminder!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately went to investigate the secret art of the Taichu Pavilion, if there is something important, he will put some of his secret art books on an exchange platform, and he can exchange the corresponding secret art, so as to inherit and browse and learn.

In this way, in the following years, Ye Tian continued to browse the secret art classics here.

Although at this level, unless it is a very precious top-notch secret art, it will not be able to improve its strength.

However, Ye Tian could increase his knowledge, which was very helpful for the changes in the path of enlightenment.

Basically, every secret art is a derivative of the changes of the Dao, so if you understand the countless secret techniques here and understand the changes of the Dao, the speed will be much faster.

Unconsciously, Ye Tian had spent tens of thousands of years in the Taichu Pavilion.

"It's time to go, I've taken out all the secret art books that I should have taken out on my body, and I can't continue to exchange more secret art books to browse and comprehend!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In short, this time the harvest is very large, after all, they are all exchanging ordinary secret art books for very high-level secret art books, which is a big profit.

These arcane arts books should have also been created or collected by the Primordial Ancestor himself, except for a few precious ones, almost all of them are here.

Of course, although Ye Tian has inherited enlightenment, he cannot pass it on, which is a limitation.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left the Taichu Pavilion and came to the Taichu Tower of Taichu Mountain.

The Taichu Tower is undoubtedly the most precious place in the Taichu Mountain, and it is also the place where many treasures of the Taichu Ancestor are stored.

At the beginning, Ye Tian didn't know much about the Taichu Tower.

But now that I have entered the Taichu Mountain, I naturally have some understanding of the Taichu Tower.

The Primal Tower is divided into nine layers, each of which has its own tests, and even the first layer requires the strength of the Eight Realms-level controllers to break through.

Layers one to three correspond to the strength of the three levels of the Eight Realm-level masters.

The fourth to sixth layers correspond to the three grades of strength of the Nine Realm-level masters.

And the seventh to ninth layers correspond to the three grades of strength of the Ten Realm-level masters.

Through the achievements of the Taichu Tower, you can see the strength of the other party to a certain extent.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Primal Tower, there was a huge list here, and the list recorded a list of the eternal controllers who came here to break into the Primal Tower.

On this list, Ye Tian saw a large number of Eternal Controllers, as well as some acquaintances.

For example, his three senior brothers and one senior sister.

"Senior Brother Jiang You has passed the fifth layer, so it seems that Senior Brother is considered a mid-grade among the Nine Realm-level controllers!"

"Fourth Senior Sister Xue Nu has passed the sixth layer, and this strength ranks among the top Nine Realm-level controllers. The fourth senior sister is about to impact the Ten Realms level controllers, and it is normal to have such strength. "

"Second Senior Brother Ancient Demon has passed the eighth layer, which means that Senior Brother Ancient Demon's strength among the Eternal Controllers is medium. "

"The third senior brother black decay actually broke through the ninth layer, and the fourth senior sister said that the third senior brother black decay was the strongest, and it was so. "

The three senior brothers and the fourth senior sister are all on the list, which means that they all have the Taichu Order and have been to Taichu Mountain.

However, the current Taichu Mountain may not be of much help to them, so they did not stay in Taichu Mountain.

"Go in and break in, maybe you can get some benefits!"

Ye Tian directly entered the Taichu Tower and came to the first floor.

The level of the Primal Tower is not complicated, you only need to face an opponent and defeat it.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian directly exerted his strength, instantly killed the opponent of the first layer, and broke through the first level.

Then, the second and third levels were passed very easily.

But the fourth level is a little difficult, because the opponent in this level is equivalent to the weakest Nine Realms level master, and he needs to be defeated in order to be considered to have passed the fourth level.

Fortunately, Ye Tian's current strength is not weak, so he quickly defeated the opponent in the fourth level.

Finally, Ye Tian came to the fifth level.

Once he defeated the opponent of the fifth level, Ye Tian could be regarded as a medium combat power among the Nine Realm-level masters.
